pages.keyword: why do I feel anxious all the time
pages.angle: constant low-grade anxiety with no obvious cause, the 2am search

pages.keyword: why do I cry for no reason
pages.angle: unexplained tears, emotional overflow they can't explain

pages.keyword: why do I feel empty inside
pages.angle: emotional numbness and emptiness, the hollow feeling

pages.keyword: why can't I stop overthinking
pages.angle: the racing mind that won't switch off

pages.keyword: why do I feel disconnected from everyone
pages.angle: feeling alone even around people, emotional disconnection

pages.keyword: I feel numb and I don't know why
pages.angle: emotional flatness, feeling nothing at all

pages.keyword: I feel like I'm failing at life
pages.angle: the crushing sense of falling behind everyone else

pages.keyword: I can't get out of bed lately
pages.angle: the heaviness of depression, losing basic function

pages.keyword: everything feels pointless lately
pages.angle: loss of meaning and motivation, anhedonia in plain words

pages.keyword: why do I feel worse at night
pages.angle: the way anxiety and low mood intensify after dark

pages.keyword: therapy for high functioning anxiety
pages.angle: looking fine on the outside, falling apart inside

pages.keyword: therapy for health anxiety
pages.angle: constant fear about illness and the body

pages.keyword: therapy for social anxiety
pages.angle: the dread of being perceived, avoiding people

pages.keyword: therapy for panic attacks
pages.angle: the terror of panic, fear of the next one

pages.keyword: therapy for depression without medication
pages.angle: wanting help but not wanting pills

pages.keyword: therapy for seasonal depression
pages.angle: the winter slump, light and mood

pages.keyword: therapy for intrusive thoughts
pages.angle: disturbing unwanted thoughts and the shame around them

pages.keyword: therapy for chronic worrying
pages.angle: the worry that never ends, always bracing for disaster

pages.keyword: therapy for emotional burnout
pages.angle: running on empty, depleted past exhaustion

pages.keyword: therapy for feeling stuck in life
pages.angle: paralysis, the sense that nothing is moving forward

pages.keyword: I feel like a burden to everyone
pages.angle: the painful belief that you weigh others down, handled gently

pages.keyword: why am I so angry all the time
pages.angle: irritability and anger masking deeper pain

pages.keyword: I don't feel like myself anymore
pages.angle: the loss of identity, not recognising who you've become

pages.keyword: therapy for constant exhaustion and low mood
pages.angle: the bone-tired heaviness of ongoing depression
